Article.ArticleTitle: Tempo-specific complex training improves lower-limb strength and neuromuscular function in male collegiate soccer players: an experimental study.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: School of Physical Education, Central China Normal University, Wuhan, China.
School of Physical Education, Central China Normal University, Wuhan, China. giraffelej@hotmail.com.
, 152 Luoyu Road, Hongshan District, Wuhan, 430079, China. giraffelej@hotmail.com.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: The study was approved by the Ethics Committee of the School of Physical Education, Central China Normal University (approval No.: CCNU-IRB-2024-008). All participants provided written informed consent prior to participation. The study was conducted in accordance with the Declaration of Helsinki. Consent for publication: Written informed consent for publication of data and anonymized images was obtained from all participants. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
